title: Croydon Apartment Unit Renovation
summary: Apartment joinery upgrade in Croydon focused on cleaner cabinetry, built-in storage and a better-resolved everyday layout.
heroAlt: Croydon apartment renovation with compact custom joinery
overview: This Croydon apartment project shows how joinery can do more of the heavy lifting in a compact footprint. The cabinetry needed to improve storage and day-to-day function while still feeling proportioned to the scale of the apartment.
materials: Joinery fitted to a tighter footprint

afterImages.alt: Croydon apartment finished kitchen with marble island and gold pendants
afterImages.caption: Completed Croydon apartment kitchen with marble island, gold pendant lights and dark custom cabinetry.
Wide view of the completed Croydon kitchen showing the full run of cabinetry and island layout.
Cabinetry detail from the finished Croydon apartment kitchen renovation.

beforeImages.caption: The Croydon apartment kitchen before renovation, showing the original timber cabinetry and layout.

spaces.title: Apartment joinery
spaces.text: Built-in storage and cabinetry were planned around a tighter apartment layout so the result feels practical, proportioned and visually calmer.

outcome: The completed apartment feels more deliberate and easier to live in, with the joinery tightening the layout instead of crowding it.
ctaText: If you are planning an apartment joinery upgrade in Croydon, we can help map out the right cabinetry scope and next step.
